description: Unit: ticket mobile rich-text helper parses legacy plain text into a paragraph block document.
Unit: ticket mobile rich-text helper parses serialized BlockNote JSON arrays without mutation.
Unit: ticket mobile rich-text helper parses ProseMirror/Tiptap `{type:'doc'}` content into the runtime initialization shape.
Unit: ticket mobile rich-text helper returns a safe empty default for null, undefined, or whitespace-only values.
Unit: bridge envelope validators accept known native-to-web message shapes and reject malformed payloads.
Unit: bridge envelope validators accept known web-to-native message shapes and reject malformed payloads.
Unit: request/response correlation resolves `getHTML` with the matching request id.
Unit: request/response correlation resolves `getJSON` with the matching request id.
Unit: pending bridge requests time out cleanly when the runtime does not respond.
Unit: runtime emits `editor-ready` only after initialization content and configuration have been applied.
Unit: runtime read-only mode does not mutate content and does not apply formatting commands.
Unit: runtime editable mode accepts typing and formatting commands after initialization.
Unit: runtime reports active bold, italic, underline, bullet-list, and ordered-list state in its `state-change` payload.
Unit: runtime reports undo and redo capability correctly in its `state-change` payload.
Unit: runtime debounces full `content-change` payload emission while still sending lightweight state changes promptly.
Unit: wrapper imperative ref forwards `focus()` and `blur()` into the web runtime bridge.
Unit: wrapper imperative ref forwards `setContent()` into the web runtime bridge.
Unit: wrapper imperative ref resolves `getHTML()` from the web runtime response path.
Unit: wrapper imperative ref resolves `getJSON()` from the web runtime response path.
Unit: wrapper keeps toolbar controls disabled until `editor-ready` has been received.
Unit: wrapper blocks unexpected external navigation attempts from the editor runtime.
Component: mobile ticket description section renders rich formatted content instead of a plain `Text` node when rich content is present.
Component: mobile ticket description section falls back to safe plain-text display when the saved description payload is malformed.
Component: entering mobile ticket description edit mode mounts the rich editor wrapper with the existing description content.
Component: saving an edited mobile ticket description persists the serialized rich-text string through the existing ticket attribute update path.
Component: canceling mobile ticket description editing leaves persisted content unchanged.
Component: mobile ticket comment items render formatted rich content instead of raw JSON when saved comments contain serialized rich-text strings.
Component: mobile ticket comment items preserve tappable links inside rendered rich content.
Component: mobile ticket comment items render supported saved inline image content when the saved note references attachment-backed images.
Component: mobile ticket comment composer mounts the rich editor wrapper and preserves the existing internal/public visibility controls.
Component: unsent mobile ticket rich-comment drafts still persist across screen reloads for the same user and ticket.
Component: submitting a new rich mobile ticket comment sends the serialized rich-text string through the existing comment creation flow.
Component: mobile existing saved comments remain non-editable in v1 even though the wrapper exists elsewhere on the screen.
API contract: ticket detail responses expose normalized rich render data for description content suitable for mobile rendering.
API contract: ticket comment list responses expose normalized rich render data for saved comment content suitable for mobile rendering.
Unit: server rich render helper derives HTML for serialized BlockNote JSON using the shared formatting package rather than a mobile-only renderer.
Unit: server rich render helper derives HTML for ProseMirror/Tiptap `{type:'doc'}` payloads using the shared formatting package.
DB-backed integration happy path: updating a ticket description from mobile persists a serialized rich-text string into `ticket.attributes.description` and the value round-trips on refetch.
DB-backed integration guard path: legacy plain-text `ticket.attributes.description` loads into the mobile editor and saves back as canonical serialized rich-text content.
DB-backed integration happy path: creating a mobile ticket comment persists the serialized rich-text string through the ticket comments API and returns render-friendly content on refetch.
DB-backed integration guard path: legacy plain-text saved comment content remains viewable in mobile rich read-only rendering without crashing.
Integration: development-only bridge diagnostics log editor ready timing and request timeout failures without enabling noisy production logging.
Manual QA: iOS ticket detail screen supports viewing, editing description, composing comment, tapping links, and saving normal-sized content without layout breakage.
Manual QA: Android ticket detail screen supports viewing, editing description, composing comment, tapping links, and saving normal-sized content without layout breakage.
Manual QA: malformed saved description or comment payloads degrade to safe text display rather than breaking the rest of the ticket detail screen.
